description: This file defines a Flutter widget called TalePlayerScreen, which provides a UI for playing audio tales. It manages playback controls, displays tale information, and shows progress.

classes.name: TalePlayerScreen
classes.description: A stateless widget showing the UI for audio tale playback, including title, summary, progress bar, controls, and content display.

methods.name: _format
methods.description: Formats seconds into mm:ss string for display.
